meta.description: Smuggler specialization (Scoundrel career). 30 talent cards: 10 Tier 1, 8 Tier 2, 6 Tier 3, 4 Tier 4, 2 Tier 5. Players draft 15 into a pyramid (5/4/3/2/1).

specialization.name: Smuggler
specialization.description: A fast-talking, quick-shooting rogue who relies on luck, charm, and a fast blaster. The Smuggler excels at ranged-light combat, evasion, and getting out of tight spots.

talents.name: Quick Strike
talents.description: Add 1 Ability die per rank to combat checks against targets that have not yet acted this encounter.

talents.name: Grit
talents.description: Increase Strain Threshold by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Rapid Reaction
talents.description: Suffer 1 strain per rank to add successes equal to ranks to Initiative checks.

talents.name: Quick Draw
talents.description: Draw or holster a weapon as an incidental instead of a maneuver.

talents.name: Convincing Demeanor
talents.description: Remove 1 setback die per rank from Deception and Skulduggery checks.

talents.name: Toughened
talents.description: Increase Wound Threshold by 2 per rank.

talents.name: Black Market Contacts
talents.description: Reduce rarity of equipment sought on the black market by 1 per rank (minimum 0).

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Once per encounter per rank, recover 2 strain as an incidental.

talents.name: Dodge
talents.description: When targeted by a combat check, suffer strain up to ranks in Dodge to upgrade the difficulty of that check by an equal amount.

talents.name: Shortcut
talents.description: Remove 1 setback die per rank from Athletics and Coordination checks when navigating difficult terrain.

talents.name: Side Step
talents.description: As a maneuver, upgrade the difficulty of ranged attacks targeting you by 1 per rank until the start of your next turn.

talents.name: Point Blank
talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank to ranged attacks at Short range or closer.

talents.name: Durable
talents.description: Subtract 10 per rank from critical injury rolls against you (minimum 11).

talents.name: Bought Time
talents.description: Suffer 2 strain to perform an additional maneuver on your turn.

talents.name: Lucky Shot
talents.description: As a maneuver, upgrade attack pool by 1 per rank for next Ranged (Light) check this turn.

talents.name: Smooth Talker
talents.description: Remove 1 setback die from Cool and Deception checks.

talents.name: Hidden Storage
talents.description: Gain +1 encumbrance capacity. One concealed item cannot be found by casual searches.

talents.name: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank to critical injury rolls inflicted on opponents.

talents.name: Natural Marksman
talents.description: Add 1 Proficiency die (yellow) to all Ranged (Light) checks.

talents.name: Heroic Resilience
talents.description: Once per session, when you would be incapacitated by wounds, immediately heal 5 wounds and continue acting.

talents.name: Improved Dodge
talents.description: When using Dodge, additionally add 1 Difficulty die (purple) to the attacker's pool.

talents.name: Guns Blazing
talents.description: Make a Ranged (Light) attack against all targets within Short range of you.

talents.name: Crippling Blow
talents.description: Increase Critical rating of next attack by 1 difficulty, but add +20 to the Critical Injury result.

talents.name: Enduring
talents.description: Gain +1 Soak per rank.

talents.name: Deadly Accuracy
talents.description: Choose one combat skill when purchased. Add ranks in that skill as bonus damage to one hit per round.

mechanicalEffect.description: Player selects combat skill at purchase

talents.name: Unstoppable
talents.description: Suffer 3 strain to perform a second Action this turn (once per encounter).

talents.name: Supreme Dodge
talents.description: When targeted by a ranged attack, attacker must also add 1 Challenge die (red) to the pool.

talents.name: Iron Body
talents.description: Reduce all strain suffered (from any source) by 1, to a minimum of 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Agility)
talents.description: Permanently increase Agility by 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Cunning)
talents.description: Permanently increase Cunning by 1.
